agent-patterns
  • API Reference
  • View page source

API Reference

This section provides detailed API documentation for the Agent Patterns library.

Core APIs

  • BaseAgent - Abstract base class for all agent patterns

  • Memory System - Classes for working with different memory types

  • Tool System - Interfaces and implementations for tool integration

Pattern APIs

  • ReAct - API for the Reason + Act pattern

  • Reflexion - API for the Reflexion pattern

  • LLM Compiler - API for the LLM Compiler pattern

  • Self-Discovery - API for the Self-Discovery pattern

  • LATS - API for the LangChain Agents Tracing System pattern

  • Reflection - API for the Reflection pattern

  • ReWOO - API for the Reason, World model, Observe, Outcome pattern

  • Reflection and Refinement - API for the Reflection and Refinement pattern

  • Plan and Solve - API for the Plan and Solve pattern

  • STORM - API for the STORM pattern

API Organization

The API documentation is organized by module:

  • Core API - Documentation for core components

  • Patterns API - Documentation for pattern implementations

  • Memory API - Documentation for memory system

  • Tools API - Documentation for tool system

Using the API Reference

This API reference is automatically generated from the codebase and includes:

  • Class and method definitions

  • Parameter descriptions and types

  • Return value descriptions and types

  • Inheritance information

  • Code examples

Development Status

The Agent Patterns API is under active development. API stability is indicated with these markers:

  • ✓ Stable - API is stable and not expected to change

  • ⚠️ Experimental - API may change in future versions

  • 🔄 Beta - API is mostly stable but may have minor changes
